summary: Completed testing of Templates Gallery feature and Watch Demo modal - all tests passed. Backend: 17/17 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/templates returns 8 templates with all categories
Backend: GET /api/templates?category=saas filters correctly (1 result)
Backend: GET /api/templates?category=backend filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/templates?category=ecommerce filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/templates?category=all returns all 8 templates
Backend: GET /api/templates/saas-dashboard returns template with all fields
Backend: GET /api/templates/ecommerce-store returns template correctly
Backend: GET /api/templates/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: All 8 template IDs match expected list
Backend: POST /api/templates/{id}/create without auth returns 403
Backend: POST /api/templates/saas-dashboard/create creates project with correct name/description/tech_stack
Backend: POST /api/templates/portfolio-site/create creates portfolio project
Backend: POST /api/templates/nonexistent/create returns 404
Backend: All templates have valid complexity values (beginner/intermediate/advanced)
Backend: All templates have positive estimated_credits
Backend: Popular templates are correctly marked
Frontend: Templates page loads at /templates with all 8 template cards
Frontend: Templates page has search input
Frontend: Category filter buttons work (All, Backend, SaaS, etc.)
Frontend: Filter 'backend' shows 1 card, 'saas' shows 1 card, 'all' shows 8
Frontend: Search 'Dashboard' correctly filters to 1 result
Frontend: Search 'React' shows 7 results (templates using React)
Frontend: Search invalid term shows 0 results
Frontend: 'Use Template' button creates project and navigates to workspace
Frontend: Sidebar shows Templates nav link between Dashboard and Settings
Frontend: Dashboard 'Browse Templates' button exists (hidden when projects exist)
Frontend: Watch Demo modal opens from landing page
Frontend: Watch Demo modal shows 'Coming Soon' fallback (video file empty - expected)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for templates feature
Templates API returns consistent data structure with all required fields
Category filtering works correctly on both backend and frontend
Project creation from templates correctly copies name, description, prompt, and tech_stack
seed_data_creation: Created test projects from templates during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Templates Gallery feature fully tested and working. 8 templates available: saas-dashboard, ecommerce-store, blog-platform, api-backend, portfolio-site, realtime-chat, ai-assistant, mobile-app. Watch Demo modal shows 'Coming Soon' fallback since demo-video.mp4 is empty (expected behavior). Previous core features (auth, projects, AI generation, settings, admin) tested in iteration_3.json - all working.
mocked_apis_note: Same as before - xAI Grok, Stripe, SendGrid, GitHub OAuth all in demo mode. Templates feature is fully functional without external APIs.
